name: deleteManagedObjectDefinition
title: Delete Managed Object Definition
description: Delete a managed object type definition from PingOne AIC. Removes the object type from the managed config. IMPORTANT: This will fail if other object types have relationship properties referencing this object type.

checks.message: Object name must contain only letters, numbers, and underscores

_def.description: Name of the managed object type to delete (e.g., "alpha_device", "custom_application"). Must contain only a-z, A-Z, 0-9, and underscore characters.
